items.title: This interactive timeline shows every iPhone size, color, spec, and model ever released
items.summary: A new interactive data project from sheets.works lets you scroll through every iPhone model ever released, complete with tech specs, colors, and even a timeline of hardware features Apple removed from the device over the years. Check it...

items.title: New Apple TV Waiting for Siri: Here's What's Coming When It Launches
items.summary: We're long overdue for an Apple TV update, and there have been rumors about an imminent refresh since late last year. It's now sounding like we're not going to get a new version for several months because of Siri delays. If you're holding...

items.title: Get Microsoft Office 2024 for Mac or PC for $100
items.summary: This discounted lifetime license to Microsoft Office Home & Business for Mac 2024 is a great alternative to pricey monthly fees. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Developer behind controversial AI apps sues Apple over App Store takedowns
items.summary: Ex-Human, the developer behind Botify and Photify AI, is suing Apple over what it calls "arbitrary" App Store removals. Here are the details.

items.title: Mac Studio delivery '4-5 months' out for top RAM after Apple dropped 512GB option
items.summary: Apple doesn't typically sell you a product four to five months before delivery. There's nothing typical about the global memory shortage, though. AI servers need a lot of RAM, and that's seriously affecting Apple's top Mac RAM inventory.

items.title: Tesla's Texas factory workforce reportedly shrunk 22% in 2025
items.summary: Tesla's headcount fell from 21,191 workers to 16,506 workers in 2025, according to a report, as it grappled with its second straight year of declining sales.

items.title: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
items.summary: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

items.title: Report claims Arm chips will power 90% of AI servers based on custom processors in 2029 - x86 and RISC-V on the outside looking in
items.summary: As hyperscalers seek efficiency and control from custom CPUs they build in house, they adopt Arm and 90% of servers running custom silicon will use the Arm ISA in 2029.
